---
title: "Moinul Lab"
output: 
 html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 1
    #code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,warning=FALSE, cache=TRUE)
```

This is the website of Dr. Moinul Islam. He is working as an assistant professor at Kochi University of Technology.

Ph.D., Kyushu University (2016)

# My first post

Compiled: `r Sys.Date()`

Notice that whatever you define as a top level header, automatically gets put into the table of contents bar on the left. 

# My second post

Compiled: `r Sys.Date()`

Enjoy your research

## Contents 

1. Research and dreams

2. My publications

3. Lectures
